texts.t002: High-speed PVC roll-up doors with SIE40–SIE100 servo/gear motors, radar and loop activation, self-repairing curtains and interlocking for cleanrooms, cold storage and logistics docks.
texts.t012: Fast-cycle PVC curtain doors that cut energy loss, dust and pest ingress at busy openings.
texts.t013: Zipper-edge curtains that re-insert automatically after accidental impact — near-zero downtime.
texts.t014: Insulated, heated-frame rapid doors for cold rooms and freezer corridors down to −25 °C.
texts.t015: In-house motor and controller range with encoder limits, frequency drive soft start and service counters.

texts.t018: Opening speeds of 0.8–2.0 m/s depending on size and drive, with radar, loop, pull-cord or interlock activation.
texts.t019: All doors include manual operation; UPS backup and battery kits are available for critical hygiene openings.
texts.t027: GI, aluminium, polycarbonate & India's only 100% Indian-make full-length transparent shutter.
texts.t028: Insulated overhead sectional doors, stacking doors and residential garage automation with SIE16/36 openers.
texts.t029: Swing & sliding gate automation — 21 swing motor models, telescopic and cantilever systems.
